tweets.content: RT by @elonmusk: If you want to start a startup, don't learn "entrepreneurship." Learn how to build things. The hard part of startups is not "entrepreneurship" but product: to know what to build, and to be able to build it.
tweets.translated: RT @elonmusk：如果你想创业，就不要学习“创业精神”。学习如何构建东西。初创公司的困难部分不是“创业精神”，而是产品：知道要构建什么，并且能够构建它。

tweets.content: Platforms treat users differently. Numbers speak.
tweets.translated: 平台对待用户的方式不同。数字说话。

tweets.content: Woah... coming up to 9 years of building together!
tweets.translated: 哇哦...一起建设了 9 年！

tweets.content: 👏 great to see national blockchain deployments.
tweets.translated: 👏 很高兴看到国家区块链部署。

tweets.content: Just putting it out there: If everything crashes together from $NBIS, $MRVL, $INTC, $SNDK, $AMD, $SIVE, $MU, $LITE, and others... Which are all down -4% to -10%+ today so far. Probably doesn't have anything to do with individual fundamentals. Indiscriminate selloffs from things like cascading margin liquidations, usually provide compelling opportunities if the underlying improves.
tweets.translated: 只是把它放在那里：如果 $NBIS、$MRVL、$INTC、$SNDK、$AMD、$SIVE、$MU、$LITE 和其他所有东西一起崩溃......到目前为止，它们今天都下跌了 -4% 到 -10%+。可能和个人的基本面没有什么关系。如果基本面改善，诸如级联保证金清算之类的不加选择的抛售通常会提供令人信服的机会。

tweets.content: Raymond James initiated coverage of $SPCX with “Strong Buy”. Giving it a $800 PT, valuing SpaceX at a ~$10T valuation. No words. Jokes about “institutional” notes for retail write themselves.
tweets.translated: Raymond James 开始对 $SPCX 进行“强力买入”报道。给予 800 美元的 PT，对 SpaceX 的估值约为 10T 美元。没有言语。关于零售业“机构”票据的笑话是他们自己写的。

tweets.content: Be Samsung at $1.24T: > market: we don’t think you can keep hiking memory prices > proceeds to hikes dram by 20% > releases earnings > most profitable company in the world beating $NVDA and $AAPL > operating profits growing 1803% Y/Y market: sells off Samsung -7%
tweets.translated: 三星价格为 1.24T 美元： > 市场：我们认为内存价格无法继续上涨 > 收益将上涨 20% > 公布收益 > 击败 NVDA 和 AAPL 成为全球最赚钱的公司 > 营业利润同比增长 1803% 市场：抛售三星 -7%
